## Summary

- [ ] Describe what changed and why.

## Quality Gates

- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`

## Security & Reliability Checklist

- [ ] Auth and authorization paths are unchanged or explicitly hardened.
- [ ] No secrets/API keys/user paths are logged.
- [ ] Request bounds, rate limits, and error handling are preserved.
- [ ] MCP changes remain backward-compatible unless explicitly documented.

## Greptile Review

- [ ] Greptile review completed.
- [ ] Addressed required comments or documented rationale for any dismissed comments.
